node.title: Uber | Phone screen | Maximum distance between cars in a garage

topic.title: Uber | Phone screen | Maximum distance between cars in a garage

post.content: You are given an array of size n to represent the garage create a function add_car that inserts a cars into garage one by one and maximizes the distance between it and the other cars already in the array. For example, for a given array of size 10, cars would be inserted into positions 0,9,5, 2, 7, 3, 6...
[@Shayanja](https://leetcode.com/Shayanja) Please update the company name and interview type. Thanks!
